description: Designed an audit system for VoIP app changes, adding full change-history visibility and making investigations faster. Designed an in-app version comparator for VoIP configurations, reducing review time by 90%+ with a visual file-level diff workflow. Translated support, configuration, and release needs into practical backlog items and implementation-ready solutions.

Led a team of 4 developers delivering 70+ high-quality interactive presentations for Pfizer. Coordinated project delivery by aligning client requirements, design specifications, QA feedback, and engineering execution across a 5-person team. Improved delivery consistency through standardized project setup, onboarding documentation, and workflow automation that increased development speed by 400%.

Led an SEO and accessibility overhaul, increasing web traffic by 40%. Clarified stakeholder goals, shaped functional requirements, and translated product ideas into delivery tasks. Built a custom analytics system for real-time product visibility and supported user-flow improvements that increased conversions by up to 10%.

Built a real-time vehicle data logging and trip management system using in-car diagnostic devices, improving data retrieval speed and operational transparency by 5x. Designed data-heavy dashboards, widgets, and debugging flows that improved fleet visibility, issue investigation, and operational decision-making.

Worked directly with clients to understand business needs, clarify scope, prioritize changes, and turn ideas into usable web products. Delivered an event ticketing platform with a 4-person development team within 3 months and built customer-facing functionality for medical and service-oriented businesses.
